zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱下行整理
zh.content:
短线价格运行在0.173附近，日内微跌约1%，整体呈震荡偏弱结构，低点不断试探，动能不足，尚未形成明确反转信号。延续整理走势

MACD柱值维持负区间运行，空头动能占优；价格跌破20日均线0.1767附近，均线系统呈压制状态，反弹受限。

下方支撑0.1730与0.1725，失守或下探前低；上方阻力0.1767及0.1780，需放量突破确认。

操作建议观望为主，等待重回20日均线再考虑做多；跌破支撑则短线偏空并严格止损

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD continues to trade in a subdued, slightly bearish short-term structure after failing to reclaim its 20-period simple moving average at 0.1767. Price action is compressed near 0.173–0.175, indicating low volatility and indecision, but the bias remains fragile as the market holds below a key dynamic resistance. The inability to sustain momentum above the intraday high suggests sellers still dominate near-term direction.

The MACD reading at -0.00157 confirms bearish momentum is still present, even if not aggressively accelerating. With the signal line not provided, confirmation strength is limited, but price behavior aligns with fading upside pressure. The absence of RSI data restricts overbought/oversold context, yet the tight range and negative momentum typically indicate consolidation within a corrective phase rather than a bullish reversal attempt.

Immediate support is forming around 0.1734–0.1735, which coincides with the recent 24-hour low and current price floor. A breakdown below this zone could expose lower liquidity pockets and extend the correction. On the upside, 0.1767 (SMA20) acts as the first resistance, followed by 0.1800 as a psychological barrier where prior supply pressure may re-emerge strongly. Sustained acceptance above resistance would be required to shift bias.

Given the prevailing bearish bias and compression near support, short-term traders may favor range-bound strategies, selling rallies toward resistance while managing tight risk. Breakout traders should wait for confirmation above the SMA20 before considering long positions, as false upside moves remain possible. Conversely, a decisive break below 0.1734 would strengthen downside continuation signals and justify cautious short exposure with disciplined stops.
